content:
Canaltech is one of Brazil’s leading technology journalism portals, focused on news, analysis, and tutorials about technology, gaming, science, and innovation. Part of the Magalu ecosystem, the outlet reaches millions of readers monthly and is a reference in the country’s tech media segment. In January 2024, Bruno joined the portal as a reporter. In recognition of his exceptional performance and contributions throughout the year, he was awarded the Canaltech Outstanding Professional award, celebrating exclusive reports and interviews, highly relevant journalistic coverage, and integration into strategic projects that put Canaltech in the spotlight in Brazilian media.
The recognition culminated in an invitation to become editor in October of the same year, consolidating his position as one of the most important voices in technology journalism in Brazil and reaffirming his commitment to editorial excellence and innovation in journalism.
In 2025, he further expanded his international presence by attending the realme GT 7 launch in Paris, the Expand North Star and GITEX Global events in Dubai — one of the world’s largest technology and innovation gatherings — and AWS re:Invent in Las Vegas, United States, Amazon Web Services’ flagship cloud computing conference.
Throughout Brazil, he holds credentials from Web Summit Rio, Rio Innovation Week, Rock in Rio, and other conferences.
He also produced and hosted exclusive interviews on the Canaltech Podcast, a space dedicated to discussing trends, launches, and the impact of technological innovations.
In addition, he appeared on CNN Brasil segments, sharing market analysis on technology, and on Porta 101, a program that covered the behind-the-scenes of the tech industry at Canaltech.

title: Canaltech

content:
CNN Brasil is Brazil’s leading 24-hour news channel, part of the global CNN franchise. With journalistic coverage spanning politics, economics, business, and technology, the network is a reference in live journalism in the country. As editor at Canaltech, Bruno appeared on CNN Brasil segments, contributing analyses and commentary on the technology market, innovation trends, and the impact of digital transformation on the Brazilian economy.
Live Appearances
summary: Appearances on CNN Brasil’s technology and business segments.
title: CNN Brasil

content:
Giz Brasil is the Brazilian edition of Gizmodo, one of the world’s largest websites covering technology, gadgets, and digital culture. Focused on news, product reviews, and the impact of technology on everyday life, the outlet is a go-to reference for innovation enthusiasts. In late 2023, Bruno worked as a reporter at Giz Brasil, covering the world of technology, gadgets, and innovation.
Reports, interviews, and reviews 'For All Mankind' exclusivo: produção revela captura de asteroide na 4ª temporada ↗ Exclusive Interview Entertainment Giz Brasil apresenta Pretinha, a dog influencer que só comemora gol do Fluminense ↗ Interview Social Media 5G: São Paulo e Rio são as cidades com maior nº de acessos ↗ News Telecom 5G Mais produtividade e novas necessidades: como a IA impacta o mercado de trabalho? ↗ Report Artificial Intelligence Job Market Claro, Tim e Vivo aderem ao Open Gateway para combater fraudes; saiba detalhes ↗ News Telecom Security
summary: Journalism covering technology, gadgets, and innovation for Giz Brasil.
title: Giz Brasil

content:
Tecnoblog is one of Brazil’s largest and most respected technology journalism outlets, with in-depth coverage of gadgets, apps, business, and digital culture. A reference for millions of readers, the outlet stands out for its editorial quality and specialized technology journalism. From 2020 to 2023, Bruno worked as a reporter at Tecnoblog, developing specialized coverage of technology and business. During this period, he produced investigative reports, in-depth analyses, and SEO-optimized news stories, building relationships with industry sources and covering in-person events.
He was part of the Tecnocast cast, Tecnoblog’s official podcast, participating in episodes on the major topics in the technology industry. He also worked on the production and presentation of video content.
In 2022, he traveled to Buenos Aires, Argentina, to cover the launch of the Motorola Edge 30 Ultra on-site — one of the most prominent international coverage pieces of the period. Throughout his time at the outlet, he tracked content metrics and performance to guide editorial strategy.

title: Tecnoblog

content:
Brazilian journalist specialized in technology. With ten years of experience, he has worked in the newsrooms of Canaltech, Gizmodo Brasil, iHelp BR, Tecnoblog, and TechTudo. He is also an undergraduate student in Computer Science with a focus on Data Science.
Follow my work →
title: Bruno De Blasi

content: Have a suggestion, proposal, or just want to chat? Reach out via the email below or find me on social media.
title: Contact

content:
Bruno Gall De Blasi covering ENEX 2025 in Dubai Technology journalist with ten years of experience, currently editor at Canaltech — one of Brazil’s largest technology outlets. Driven by the curiosity that defines good journalism, he expanded his work into data science and computing, combining journalistic investigation with analytical thinking to tell increasingly data-driven stories. Based in Rio de Janeiro, he covers topics such as artificial intelligence, innovation, startups, privacy, digital security, connected health, fintechs, education, sustainability, and policy.
He has participated in international coverage in Buenos Aires, Paris, Dubai (GITEX Global and Expand North Star), Las Vegas (AWS re:Invent), as well as domestic events such as Web Summit Rio, Rio Innovation Week, and Rock in Rio.
He also works across different media formats, with appearances on CNN Brasil, and as host of the Canaltech Podcast, Tecnocast (Tecnoblog), and Porta 101 (Canaltech).
